display_text: Nevermore Aghanim's Scepter: Increases Necromastery max souls. This enhances his sustained damage output and transforms him into a late-game powerhouse, countering tanky lineups with high physical durability.
search_text: Nevermore Aghanim Scepter Necromastery late-game physical durability sustained damage

display_text: Nevermore Aghanim's Shard: Reduces Shadowraze cooldown per enemy hero. This upgrade improves his burst potential and anti-kiting capabilities, making him more effective against mobile or clustered enemy teams.
search_text: Nevermore Aghanim Shard Shadowraze burst potential anti-kiting mobile clustered teams
